description: Use this API to change the identifier of a flow constraint record for an individual winding of a three-winding transformer in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0 and 35.2.0. ierr = opf_change_3wt_flow_id(ibus, jbus, kbus, cktid, id, idnew)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_change_3wt_flow_id(ibus, jbus, kbus, cktid, id, idnew)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number the value of ibus indicates the from bus of the winding for which the flow constraint is being introduced. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Third bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Branch flow constraint identifier. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idnew
parameters.description: New branch flow constraint identifier. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
specified three-winding transformer does not exist.
branch flow identifier is more than one character.
specified winding of three-winding transformer not found.
specified OPF branch flow constraint does not exist.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
